name: Macy's American Express® Card

welcome_offer.description: 20% off first purchase (periodic promotional offer); no standard welcome bonus

earning_rates.notes: 3 Star Money Rewards per $1 spent at Macy's
2 Star Money Rewards per $1 on furniture and mattresses
1 Star Money Reward per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Star Money Rewards
other_benefits.description: $100 in Star Money Rewards for every 1,000 points earned

other_benefits.name: Birthday Bonus
other_benefits.description: Extra Star Money bonus during birthday month

notes: American Express version of Macy's store card issued by Citi. Note: 'American Express' here refers to the network/brand, not the company American Express (which issues different cards). Store rewards program only valuable if you shop at Macy's frequently.
